studyName: Study of Melanoma Risk in Australia and the United Kingdom

variables.name: ability_to_tan
variables.description: How easily do you tan?

variables.name: ageofonset
variables.description: Age of onset of melanoma

variables.name: arm_mole2_5mm
variables.description: Number of nevi on the arms that are greater than 2mm and less than 5mm (nurse exam)

variables.name: arm_mole_ge5
variables.description: Number of nevi on the arms that are 5mm or larger (nurse exam)

variables.name: beardcolour
variables.description: For men only, if you grow a beard, what color is it?

variables.name: centre
variables.description: Centre the subject was recruited to

variables.name: countholshotclimatelt20
variables.description: For people who had holidays in a hot climate before the Age of 20 years, how many holidays did you have?

variables.name: countmolesremoved
variables.description: For people who have had moles removed in the past, how many moles have you had removed

variables.name: country_of_residence
variables.description: Country of residence

variables.name: ctbq1
variables.description: How many freckles would you have had on your face at the end of summer during childhood (self report)

variables.name: ctbq2
variables.description: How many freckles would you have had on your face at the end of summer as an adult (self report)

variables.name: ctbq3
variables.description: Which one of these descriptions best describes how moley your whole body is (self report)

variables.name: ctbq4
variables.description: How many moles altogether are on your back from the base of your neck to the top of your underpants (self report)

variables.name: mole2_5mm
